popularStory.headline: Clan Seton
popularStory.description:
Clan Seton is a Scottish clan which does not currently have a chief, therefore it is considered an Armigerous clan.  
History Origins of the Clan

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Catherine Seton於1410年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾特藍特時，她的父親William Seton20歲，母親Janet Dunbar24歲。她於1429年與Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年2月7日在蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可享年68歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Catherine Seton于1410年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾特藍特时，她的父亲William Seton20岁，母亲Janet Dunbar24岁。她于1429年与Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1478年2月7日在苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可享年68岁，埋葬在苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Catherine Seton was born in 1410, in Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, her father, William Seton, was 20 and her mother, Janet Dunbar, was 24. She married Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault in 1429, in Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 7 February 1478, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 68, and was buried in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Catherine Seton est née en 1410, à Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, William Seton, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Janet Dunbar, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault en 1429, à Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 février 1478, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Catherine Seton 1410 in Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Seton 20 und ihre Mutter Janet Dunbar 24. Sie hat 1429 in Haddingtonshire, Scotland Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Februar 1478 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland und wurde in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Seton è nata il nel 1410 nel Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, sua padre, William Seton, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Janet Dunbar, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault nel 1429, nel Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 febbraio 1478, nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Setonが1410年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアトランエントで生まれた時，父William Setonは20歳，母Janet Dunbarは24歳であった。1429年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアでAlan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressaultと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1478年2月7日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックで68歳で死去し，スコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Seton(이)가 1410년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 트랜트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Seton(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Dunbar(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1429년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에서 Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 2월 7일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Seton nasceu em 1410, em Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Seton, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Janet Dunbar, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault em 1429, em Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1478, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Catherine Seton родилась в 1410 г. в местности транент, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени William Seton было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Dunbar, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault в 1429 г. в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 февраля 1478 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия.

Murió el 7 de febrero de 1478, en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.
